sections.paragraph:
Original: חמת

Transliteration: chămâth

Phonetic: kham-awth'

BDB Definition:

Hamath = "fortress"
  1. the principle city of upper Syria in the valley of the Orontes (noun proper locative)
  2. father of the house of Rechab (noun proper masculine)

Origin: from the same as H2346

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
